gates.name: Production app identity reviewed
gates.evidenceRequired: Bundle/application id, version, build number, icon, and production config evidence

gates.name: No committed secrets or signing materials
gates.evidenceRequired: Secret scan evidence and ignored private artifact confirmation
gates.blockingRule: Blocks beta, submission, and public release

gates.name: Authentication and reviewer access smoke test passed
gates.evidenceRequired: Sign-in, cancellation, provider failure, sign-out, and reviewer access evidence

gates.name: Scoring and recovery smoke test passed
gates.evidenceRequired: Score entry, restart, network loss, and final scorecard evidence
gates.blockingRule: Blocks store submission and public release

gates.name: Privacy disclosures match app behavior
gates.evidenceRequired: Apple privacy and Google data safety answers mapped to data inventory
gates.blockingRule: Blocks store submission and public release

gates.name: Launch monitoring and escalation ready
gates.evidenceRequired: Monitoring plan with thresholds, support owner, escalation, hotfix, and rollback criteria
